name.ja: <ruby>黄<rt>たそ</rt></ruby><ruby>昏<rt>がれ</rt></ruby>の<ruby>友<rt>とも</rt></ruby>だち ドラリア

summoning_condition.en: If you have a card in your Field Zone or you have a Field Spell Card in your Graveyard, you can Normal Summon this card without Tributing.

requirement.en: Place 2 EARTH Attribute Galaxy Type monsters from your Graveyard on the bottom of your Deck in any order.

effect.en: This card gains 600 ATK until the end of this turn. Then, you can place 1 Spell Card from your Graveyard on top of your Deck, except a Normal Spell Card.
